title: alectryon subdentatus
intro: Alectryon subdentatus, also known as the Yellow Bitter Ash or Bitter Ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Pacific Islands, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Alectryon subdentatus include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Alectryon subdentatus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be found in some traditional medicine formulas and remedies.
